reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the current CLI guide eval-live stable instance selection claim covered by focused CLI, runtime, and command-catalog checks.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused CLI and runtime tests showing live targets normalize to stable instanceId entries, evaluate live dispatches one selected --instance-id into bounded request/result packets, and the current command catalog exposes the live-target and evaluate-live command family.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep stable instance-id selection separate from proof of real consumer runtime behavior.
